evals.description: Export all tasks from active feature to GitHub Issues

assertions: Creates GitHub Issues with labels and dependencies

evals.description: Export tasks with phase and user story labels
evals.prompt: Export my tasks to GitHub Issues with proper labels

assertions: Creates labels (iikit, phase-N, us-N, parallel) if missing
Applies correct labels to each issue

evals.description: Export tasks and offer merge/PR on feature branch
evals.setup: On a feature branch with completed tasks

evals.description: Should NOT activate for task generation
evals.prompt: Generate tasks for my user authentication feature

expected.reason: User wants iikit-05-tasks to generate tasks, not export to GitHub

evals.description: Should NOT activate for GitHub status checks
evals.prompt: Check the status of my GitHub Issues

expected.reason: User wants to view existing issues, not create new ones

evals.setup: Git remote is not a GitHub URL

assertions: Does not attempt to create issues

evals.description: tasks.md exists but contains no T-NNN entries
evals.setup: tasks.md is empty or has no parseable tasks
